tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Visible AIS traffic is observed mainly in the Iran route. The Oman route has gone completely dark for inbound tankers.

Based on inbound tankers, they all used Iran route. I will need to confirm later using satellite data how many tankers went in through the Oman route.

The video is from @MarineTraffic and I have included my table for inbound tankers.
